expected_path_note: Subcontractor directly engaged: SC1=Y or DE4 income=Y (60% of income) -> siap
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 05 – Subcontractor Steelworks Sixty Percent Myanmar Projects
activities: Somchai Prasert is the sole owner and managing director of a structural-steel subcontracting firm in Bangkok. The firm erects steel frames as a subcontractor on airport and dam projects commissioned by Myanmar's national government; invoices to the main contractors on these projects represent about 60% of the firm's annual receipts, and the firm's profits are Mr Prasert's main source of income. The remaining work is private warehouse construction in Thailand.
origin_of_assets: Profits of the steel subcontracting business built up over 20 years.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Business value and equipment dominate the asset base.
